title: Clay Golem Totem
description: Change the Totem texture and particles to a Clay Golem & Clay balls
body:
![Clay Golem Totem of Undying spinning in a circle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4YK7Mfk3/images/d85c82de85a310e711ac411856ba72689db281a5.gif)
## Clay Golem Totem Pack [V1.0.0]
###  [Supports versions 1.14 to 1.21]
A verison for 1.11 to 1.13.2 is coming soon!!

---

I made the Totem of Undying look like a clay golem, as well as making the confetti effect look like clay balls!

Compatable with Vanilla Tweaks Smaller Utilities!!
